jobs.name: hyperliquid_trade_signal
jobs.description: Returns a directional trade view for a single Hyperliquid perp. Output covers bias (LONG/SHORT/MIXED), suggested entry zone, stop-loss, take-profit targets, nearby liquidation clusters, and a short AI-written reasoning section grounded in local tracker data.

symbol.description: Trading symbol (e.g., BTC, ETH, SOL, DOGE)

jobs.deliverable: Full trade setup with direction, levels, and reasoning

jobs.name: best_trade_signals
jobs.description: Scans every monitored Hyperliquid perp and surfaces the strongest 1-2 opportunities. Candidates are scored by a composite of smart-money flow, positioning skew, proximity to liquidation pockets, and recent volatility. Each pick includes a complete setup with levels and reasoning.

max_signals.description: Maximum number of signals to return (1 or 2)

jobs.deliverable: Formatted trade signals with full setups

jobs.name: alpha_dashboard
jobs.description: Produces a plain-English market snapshot covering Hyperliquid perps. Includes a short summary, overall bias call (LONG/SHORT/NEUTRAL with conviction), the main catalysts driving the read, items to monitor for a regime change, and a ranked list of the most bullish and bearish tickers.
jobs.deliverable: Market overview with bias and analysis

resources.name: get_supported_perp_trading_token_list
resources.description: Enumerates every Hyperliquid perp symbol the agent currently monitors. Only symbols with active local tracker data are included. Response contains symbol name, tradability flag, max leverage, and a timestamp.

resources.name: is_symbol_supported
resources.description: Checks whether a given symbol has local tracker data and exists on the Hyperliquid exchange. Accepts the bare ticker or the -PERP suffixed form. Returns availability status, leverage info, and a reason code when unsupported.

symbol.description: Perpetual trading symbol, e.g. ETH-PERP or ETH

resources.name: get_agent_status
resources.description: Reports the agent's current workload and remaining capacity (concurrency slots, active jobs, last-updated timestamp).

resources.name: get_alpha_context_status
resources.description: Returns the age and health of the most recent market-context snapshot used by the dashboard service. Useful for checking whether the data pipeline is current before purchasing.
